data.title: WisdomTree offers $116B asset manager's tokenized funds on Solana (SOL), enabling access to money market, equity, and fixed income products.
data.description: WisdomTree has introduced a comprehensive range of regulated tokenized funds on Solana (SOL) platform, enabling institutional and retail investors to access money market, equity, and fixed income products directly on-chain. This initiative brings a diverse selection of investment opportunities to users, with the added benefit of utilizing Solana's efficient blockchain network. This move signifies the growing trend of traditional financial institutions embracing blockchain technology, with a focus on enhancing accessibility and transparency. Participants can now leverage this offering to engage in various sectors and capitalize on market opportunities while benefiting from the security and efficiency of decentralized finance.

data.title: General Motors reports Q4 EPS of $2.51 (+30.4% YoY), misses sales at $45.287B. Predicts adjusted earnings of $9.75-$10.50 for FY26, below Wall St. expectations of $11.73. RBC Capital raises price forecast from $92 to $107, citing reasons.
data.description: Car manufacturer General Motors (NYSE: GM) released its fourth-quarter financial results, surpassing expectations with adjusted earnings per share of $2.51, a 30.4% increase from the previous year. Despite beating the analyst consensus estimate of $2.20, the company fell short on sales, reporting $45.287 billion compared to the expected $45.804 billion. General Motors has projected adjusted earnings of $9.75 to $10.50 per share for fiscal 2026, which is lower than the Wall Street forecast of $11.73. RBC Capital analyst Tom Narayan revised the price target from $92 to $107, with an Outperform rating. The analyst anticipates challenges such as commodity costs and onshoring pressures to be partially balanced by regulatory advantages, warranty enhancements, reduced losses in electric vehicles, and decreased tariffs from USMCA.

data.title: Inventor creates Nerd Feeder candy dispenser with nature theme for bird watchers. (Char count: 80)
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 28, 2026, an inventor from Franklin, Massachusetts shared their inspiration behind creating a distinctive candy dispenser with a nature-themed design aimed at birdwatching enthusiasts. The inventor introduced "THE NERD FEEDER," highlighting its unique features and visual appeal. The product is envisioned to cater to individuals passionate about birdwatching and those seeking a creative candy dispenser option.

data.title: New luxury home community by Toll Brothers coming to Cumming, Georgia with sophisticated homes and resort-style amenities in Forsyth County.
data.description: In Forsyth County, Toll Brothers at Heardmont Farms presents upscale residences paired with luxurious resort-style features. The community offers a collection of elegant homes and top-tier amenities for residents to enjoy. Heardmont Farms is known for its sophisticated dwellings and extravagant facilities, creating a desirable living environment.

data.title: Fed holds rates steady with hawkish tone; Powell's term ends May 15, may stay as governor. Will S&P 500 react? (IBD)
data.description: Chairman Powell's tenure is set to conclude on May 15, although he may continue in his role as a Fed governor. The Federal Reserve has maintained its current stance, adding a hawkish adjustment. The upcoming question is whether Powell's decisions will impact the S&P 500 index. Live coverage of these developments can be found on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Correction regarding Catalyst IQ's report on automotive retail performance: Focusing on precision in inventory and pricing for 2026.
data.description: Catalyst IQ recently released a report titled "2026 State of the Industry: Precision in Inventory and Pricing Will Define Automotive Retail Performance." The report emphasizes the critical role of accuracy in inventory management and pricing strategies within the automotive retail sector. This insight was provided by Catalyst IQ on January 26, 2026, through PR Newswire. The report delves into how precise inventory management and strategic pricing will be key factors shaping the performance of automotive retail businesses moving forward.

data.title: France's defense industry report predicts a budget allocation and growth forecast till 2030, driven by domestic modernization programs and NATO alliance amid Russia-Ukraine tensions. Market size and trends, budget allocation, regulations, and acquisitions are analyzed. Key numbers: forecast till 2030, next five years growth rate.
data.description: A report on the France Defense Market has been recently added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report forecasts the market size and growth rate from 2025 to 2030. It includes analysis of key market drivers, emerging technology trends, and challenges for market participants. This comprehensive report provides insight into budget allocation, regulations, key acquisitions, and the competitive landscape. The projected growth rate for the next five years is also highlighted in the report.
